title: XPath Injection
description: Constructing XPath queries with unsanitized user input can allow attackers to alter query logic and extract unauthorized XML data (OWASP A03:2021 / CWE-643).

finding.message: Potential XPath injection via '{{token}}' in {{file}} at line {{line}}.

references: Use parameterized XPath queries if the library supports them.
Escape or strictly validate all user input before embedding in XPath expressions.
Consider using a typed XML binding library instead of raw XPath.
